During the routine walk, Amarsingh initially exhibited a limp in the right forelimb, indicating slight abnormal gait . After a short period, the gait normalised, and the elephant maintained a steady and normal locomotion throughout the remaining walk.

Stopped near Savanna Ridge corner; resumed walk after command.

Moti 3 was briefly out of control and ran during her morning walk between enclosures 1 & 2. nThe cause is supposedly a vehicle which was nearby. nShe was brought under control in a short time by her mahouts. No injuries reported.nShe completed her walk normally after the incident.

Laxmi-16 goes for walk with YEYON Dhonmati or Kanchi. nBut today kanchi’s mahout took her elephant early for walk and Dhonmati and yeyons mahout skipped morning walk due to their leg pain. nSo Laxmi-16’s mahout took her at last alone and before her elephant Chanda and Laxmi was walked who were constantly making sound and looking back from informed to supingtag by Laxmi-16’s mahout. nSo towards the end of corner of Savanna Ridge she was going out of control so mahout jumped off her and try to control her by making her sit again and climbing back. nBut she ran towards bushes and he tried to control that’s when he fell down and got injury. nFrom there he finished the round and walked her back with help of QRT.
Observed suckling mother frequently and screaming for suckle if mother declines
She was reluctant at first to enter the pond but then. She was very playful
She entered with Devi ,she was playing in the pond
